title: poivrea ovalis
intro: Poivrea ovalis, also known as the False Pimpernel, is a perennial herb native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poivrea ovalis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Poivrea ovalis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
